chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-373 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing main case. 05.11.2025 Mr. Rehmat Ali Raza Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The counsel for the petitioner submits that some of the petitioners have old disability certificate, they will approach before proper forum for obtaining fresh disability certificate in accordance with the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. However, he further submits that he will file afresh petition, for those who have valid disability certificates, separately on separate cause of action. Under the instruction, instant petition is disposed of, with permission to file separate petitions. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
